datapoints.description: Autopilot capacity management events per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: capacity_events

description: Portworx Autopilot rule status, rebalance operations, and capacity management events via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Autopilot metrics from px_autopilot_rule_status (count of active rules), px_autopilot_rebalance_status (1=active rebalance, 0=idle), and px_autopilot_capacity_events_total (counter for capacity management actions). Autopilot is an optional Portworx component; metrics may not exist if not enabled.
name: Portworx_Autopilot_Health
